title.en: One of the Five-Striped Silencers proposed.

content.en:
"Lord Aolong, if we want to kill that forbidden realm cultivator, we need to at least dispatch a six-pattern clansman, but if the six-pattern clan makes a move, we will inevitably be blocked by the other party's strong man, and the other party will also flee as soon as possible, and it is impossible to fight our six clansmen. Therefore, we made a surprise attack, and invested enough power at once, and created an opportunity for the Six Patterns to forcibly kill the cultivator in an instant. "

One of the Five-Striped Silencers proposed.

"In this case, one of the Six-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clansmen needs to make a sacrifice, and those who have the potential to be promoted to the Seven-Pattern Clansmen can't be sacrificed, find a six-Silent Annihilation Clan who has been severely injured and have no chance of being promoted, let him do it, and kill that cultivator at all costs, and I will also make a move on the other side this time to attract the attention of a large number of their strong people and create opportunities for you!

"Yes, Lord Orone!"

Many of the Silent Clans answered.

......

The area guarded by the Ancestors.

Suddenly.

He sensed a large number of Silent Annihilation Clans attacking, including the Seven Stripes Silent Annihilation Clan.

"Attention, the Silencers are here!"

Zhan Zu made a move, to resist the Seven Stripes Silence Clan.

In other directions, the Silent Annihilation also attacked at the same time.

In such a situation, unless one of the lines of defense is not under much pressure, they can go to support, but most of the lines of defense are unable to support.

The place where Ye Tian was guarding had only repelled a group of Silent Annihilation Clans not long ago, and he soon sensed that the Silent Annihilation Clan was coming, and the scale was even larger than the last time.

"Help!"

Ye Tian and Peng Zu asked for help.

However, other directions were also attacked, so there were very few people who could come to support, and it took a little time to allocate manpower, so there was no way to support them in the first place.

Rumble!!!!

The two sides fought, and Ye Tian also stopped the three Four-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clans and several Three-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clans.

Abrupt.

Another Silent Annihilation Clan appeared, and it was the Six-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan, and the other party directly found Ye Tian.

"It's not good, hurry up and support the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor!"

Many Superior Domain Ancestors exclaimed.

At this time, a half-step ancestor arrived, but when he was about to save Ye Tian, a five-step ancestor stopped this half-step ancestor.

Everyone can see that the Silent Annihilation Clan is killing Ye Tian!

"Run!"

Ye Tian used the Empty Escape Ancestral Technique and quickly retreated.

He didn't want his replica body to fall like this, so he could run away.

"You can't escape!"

The Six-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan cast the Silent Annihilation Clan Fu, affecting the surrounding time and space, greatly reducing the effect of Ye Tian's Empty Escape Ancestral Technique.

Rumble!!!

One of the hands of the six Silent Annihilators grabbed into the time and space and grabbed towards Ye Tian's position.

Click!!!

The space-time around Ye Tian shattered.

The terrifying blow directly hit Ye Tian's body, and in an instant, Ye Tian's various defenses were broken, and a claw directly penetrated Ye Tian's body.

If there was no Silence Annihilation Ancestor, Ye Tian would not be able to withstand such an attack, and the erosion of Silence Energy alone would be enough to kill him.

But now that he has the Immortal Ancestral Endowment, although such an attack annihilated ninety percent of his body, the Immortal Extinction Energy did no harm to him, and he also urged the Immortal Ancestral Technique to save his life in time.

"No way, you're not dead?"

The Six-Striped Silencer was stunned.

His strength has reached the extreme of a half-step ancestor among the creatures of the forbidden realm, killing an unsurpassed domain ancestor whose strength has not yet reached the half-step ancestor, and he is still in this time and space, which is completely beneficial to their battlefield, and he didn't kill a peerless domain ancestor with one blow?

"If you don't kill it, then do it again!"

The Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan was determined to kill Ye Tian.

The existence of such a demon, and such a difficult to kill, really made Ye Tian grow up, that is the great disaster of the Silent Annihilation Clan.

Just as he continued to deliver the second blow, an Ancestor arrived.

At this time, if this Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan retreated, he could still withdraw, even if the Ancestor chased and killed, their Seven Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan would be able to rescue him in time.

But the key is that he wants to kill Ye Tian at all costs, so he didn't retreat, but shot Ye Tian again.

"Is it necessary?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Another claw fell, Ye Tian's body was completely shattered, and this replica body could be regarded as falling.

And the ancestor also arrived, pinching the six-patterned Silence Annihilation with one hand, and although the Seven Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan of the Silence Annihilation Clan arrived, it was too late to rescue.

Bang!

This Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan was directly pinched to death by this ancestor!

The gap between the half-step ancestor and the ancestor is so big that there is almost no way to cross it.

"Withdraw!"

The Seven Stripes of Silence gave an order and began to retreat.

In the blink of an eye, all of them retreated.

And the Ancestor also quickly departed, without the slightest lingering.

Peng Zu didn't know that Ye Tian was a copy of the body, and thought it was the main body, so he suddenly sighed: "The Silent Annihilation Clan is too cunning, and the Seven Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan was not dispatched at the beginning, so the ancestors naturally won't come to support at the first time." As a result, they actually sent a Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan to death, and the speed of our call for help was a little slower, resulting in the Ancestor not saving the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor in the first place!"

"It's a pity, if the Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor rises, there is definitely hope to become the Ancestor in the future!"

Another Superiority Domain Ancestor spoke.

"I don't think you need to be sorry, the Ten Thousand Law Battle Ancestor shouldn't be dead!" said a peerless mid-stage domain ancestor.

He was a peerless domain ancestor of the Firmament Holy Gate, so he knew a little bit of news about the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor.

"Wanfa Zhan Ancestor is not dead? How is it possible, we can see it very clearly, but he was brutally killed by the Six Lines of Silence Clan, his body and soul have been wiped out, and he can still live? The ancestors can't resurrect a peerless domain ancestor!" Peng Zu shook his head and said.

"This shouldn't be the main body of the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor!" the Heavens Holy Gate's Peerless Domain Ancestor spoke: "According to what I know, the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor seems to have a doppelganger, an ontology, and that doppelganger is very peculiar, almost exactly the same as the main body, no one can tell it, and the combat power is also exactly the same. It is estimated that the Wanfa War Ancestor did not come with a real body, and it should be his doppelganger. And even if his doppelganger falls, he can still condense again!"

"And such doppelgangers?"

Peng Zu and they were shocked.

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and muttered, "The copy body died in battle?"

Due to the distance, it takes a long time for the copy body to transmit back information, so the copy body died in battle, and he did not understand the situation.

"It's okay, condense another copy body, and then go to the Sanctuary Continent!"

Ye Tian didn't care.
